title: Dishwasher
description:
Job Title: Dishwasher Location: 69 Boat Quay #01-01 S049857 Company: Hand in Hand Beijing Restaurant Pte Ltd
Type: Full-time / Part-time / Seasonal

About Us:
At Hand in Hand Beijing Restaurant, we are passionate about delivering exceptional dining experiences to our guests. Our team is committed to providing high-quality food in a clean, safe, and welcoming environment. To help us maintain these standards, we are looking for a hardworking and reliable Dishwasher to join our team. If you enjoy working behind the scenes and thrive in a fast-paced environment, we want to hear from you!

Job Overview:
As a Dishwasher, your primary responsibility will be to ensure that all dishes, utensils, glassware, and kitchen equipment are thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. You will work closely with our kitchen and service teams to keep everything running smoothly, supporting a clean and efficient workspace.

Key Responsibilities:

Wash dishes, glassware, utensils, and cooking equipment quickly and thoroughly.

Ensure that all items are sanitized and stored properly after washing.

Maintain cleanliness in the dishwashing area, including wiping down counters and shelves.

Assist with basic food prep or kitchen tasks as needed.

Sort and organize clean dishes and kitchen tools for easy access.

Remove trash and recycling from the kitchen and dining areas as required.

Help keep the kitchen organized and maintain a clean, safe environment.

Follow all food safety and sanitation procedures.

Support the kitchen staff with various tasks as required, including helping to prep food or stocking supplies.

Qualifications:

Previous experience in a similar role is preferred but not required.

Ability to work quickly and efficiently in a fast-paced environment.

Strong attention to detail and cleanliness.

Ability to follow food safety standards and proper sanitation practices.

Reliable, punctual, and able to work flexible hours, including nights, weekends, and holidays.

Ability to lift heavy items and stand for extended periods of time.

Positive attitude and willingness to work as part of a team.

What We Offer:

Competitive monthly or hourly wage.

A positive and supportive team environment.

How to Apply:
Ready to join our team? Please submit your resume via whatsapp 91396696.

postedCompany.name: QI LU RESTAURANTS HOLDINGS PTE. LTD.
